title: Elemental Reaction
description: This mod incorporates the mechanics of the game "Genshin Impact" and some items.
body:
This mod incorporates the mechanics of the game "Genshin Impact" and some items.
# Element Reaction:
The mod introduces the elemental reaction mechanism from "Genshin Impact".
You can enchant your sword with Elemental Infusion Enchantment, use Elemental Sword or equip vision and pull your bow to use elements!
# Level System:
The farther you are from your spawnpoint, the stronger the monster will be.
Enhance your armor and weapon to face them.
_*use jei to check the ascension meterials for your equipment_
# Artifact(Only Lucky Dog set now):
They can be dropped by any mobs, equip them to strengthen yourself!
